word: H6914 - קִבְרֹות הַתַּאֲוָה - Qibrôwth hat-Taʼă-vâh - kib-roth' hat-tahav-aw' - Kibroth-hattaavah

sections.paragraph:
קברות התּאוה - qibrôth hatta'ăvâh - kib-roth' hat-tah-av-aw'

From the feminine plural of H6913 and H8378 with the article inteposed; graves of the longing; Kibroth hat Taavh, a place in the Desert: - Kibroth-hattaavah.
